author_note: F1Technical / Pirelli: rain just before Hungary qualifying; race never wet enough for inters.
question: Was the 2025 Hungarian Grand Prix run wet or dry?

author_note: McLaren race report / Sky Sports: Norris dived in for inters exiting Turn 14 at Australia 2025.
question: Who pitted first for intermediates at the 2025 Australian GP late-race rain shower?

author_note: F1.com Belgian GP report: Hamilton one of first to switch from inters; Russell P5 lonely; Verstappen P4 1.5s off podium.
question: How much pace did Mercedes give up to Red Bull on lap-by-lap delta after the lap-29 inter-to-medium crossover at Spa 2025?

author_note: McLaren race report: both McLarens slid; Norris pitted exiting T14, Piastri spun into the grass.
question: What was the inter-to-slick crossover lap for the McLarens at Australia 2025, and did Piastri's spin happen on the same lap as his slick-tyre call?

author_note: RaceFans Verstappen interview: Silverstone restart spin due to set-up, not Piastri incident.
question: On the lap-22 dry-line restart at Silverstone 2025, how much time did Verstappen lose to Piastri across that single lap relative to his pre-spin pace average?

author_note: F1.com Belgian GP report: Piastri won wet-dry Spa, Hamilton early to slicks finished 6th, Verstappen 4th.
question: At the 2025 Belgian GP, compare each top-team's first-stint inter-pace delta to leader and pinpoint who waited too long to switch to slicks — was Hamilton's early switch optimal vs Verstappen's later one?

author_note: F1.com / Mercedes / McLaren British GP reports: 5 drivers gambled on slicks at start; Hülkenberg's maiden podium.
question: For the 2025 British GP, identify the inters-to-slicks (and slicks-to-inters) crossover-lap windows during each rain band and quantify the position swing for any driver who pitted off-window.
